description: You are a sports dietitian using wger to manage meal plans for athletes. A junior staff member recently added a new custom ingredient, 'Gold Standard 100% Whey', but they accidentally saved it twice. One entry contains the correct nutritional information, while the other contains a significant error in the protein field. Log in to the wger application at http://localhost (username: admin, password: adminadmin) and remove the duplicate entry with the incorrect protein value, ensuring only the accurate ingredient remains in the system.
